Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
2.7.1 Decay
(See also: HELP FURNITURE DECAY,
HELP
CUSTOMISATION
)
Almost
everything
in
Achaea
decays
. It wears out. You'll have it for a while,
and then it will cease to exist.
This is the normal way of
things
in Achaea.
How Long Do I Have?
-------------------
If you
probe
an item, you can usually see how many
Achaean
months
longer it is
likely to last. This can be multiple hundreds of Achaean months.
Decay
continues whether you are active in the realms or not.
What About
Corpses
?
-------------------
Corpses also decay, though generally at a very high rate. You cannot generally
tell
how long that is, though it is generally measured in terms of fractions of
Achaean
days
.
Is There
Nothing
I Can Do?
--------------------------
As a rule, no. Things just decay. You can customise many items, at a cost in
credits
, to no longer decay (see HELP CUSTOMISATION). Some items don't decay at
all, such as
journals
.
(See also: HELP FURNITURE DECAY, HELP CUSTOMISATION)
Achaea is developed and published by
